metadata.name: Process Credit Card Sale with Loyalty

description: An associate processes a sale for a customer paying with a credit card who is also a member of the loyalty program.

expected_outcome.expected: All items are correctly added to the transaction.

nodes.task_description: Scan the customer's loyalty card or look up their account by phone number.

expected_outcome.expected: The customer's loyalty account is successfully linked to the transaction.

nodes.task_description: Process the credit card payment and complete the sale.

expected_outcome.expected: The payment is approved, the transaction is completed, and loyalty points are awarded to the customer's account.
